title: Resizable (CanResize)
text: Resizable (CanResize) Window property of a form or application shell that determines whether the window can be resized at runtime. Value Description True Window can be resized by dragging the window borders. False Window cannot be resized. Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: For application shells, if Resizable is True , Dialog Type is set to False , and vice versa. For form components, if Resizable is True , Window Type cannot be set to Dialog or Tab , and vice versa. Applies To Application Shells for Desktop Applications Forms Related Links Dialog Window A dialog window is a modal, non-resizable window used to display forms as dialog boxes, which is typically used to display or retrieve a limited amount of information. It is defined by setting the window property Window Type to Dialog. Window Type (WindowType) Window property of a form that determines the type of window used to display the form. One of: Normal | Dialog | Primary | Secondary | Contained | Popup Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
